name: Professional Headshot Generator
description: Upload a photo and use our intuitive icon-based selector to create your perfect professional headshot. Choose from a wide range of options for backgrounds, hair styles, clothing (from suits and blouses to flannel shirts and lace dresses), subtly adjust the face shape (round, oval, heart, slim, and more), and even change the facial expression (from a neutral look to a smile, grin, or laugh). Our AI will transform your photo into a polished image perfect for LinkedIn.
